case_title: LANIER WORLDWIDE INC VS DE VERA LEONARD

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-22-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF MAR-26-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
